lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that Roy over there then?

lines.speaker: Roy jr.
lines.text: Nope, that's Red, we're on an adventure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh really? Where are you heading?

lines.speaker: Roy jr.
lines.text: To the west, to explore the Kebos Lowlands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've heard it's dangerous over there...

lines.speaker: Roy jr.
lines.text: Well, my dad has gone that way, he's a knight!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you find him, young one. I best be off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, seems pretty much the same to me.

lines.speaker: Roy jr.
lines.text: It's the colour of my little duck friend.
